compiled_state.title: Create dso:code-reviewer-test-quality agent for test bloat detection
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create the test quality review agent that detects test bloat patterns.

### Steps
1. Create plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-test-quality.md
2. Agent model: opus (per story description)
3. Detection patterns: change-detector tests, implementation-coupled assertions, tautological tests, source-file-grepping, existence-only assertions
4. Output: standard reviewer-findings.json format (same as security/performance overlays)
5. Reference the shared behavioral testing standard

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-test-quality.md — Create
- .test-index — Edit

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Agent file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-test-quality.md
- [ ] Agent references behavioral-testing-standard
  Verify: grep -q "behavioral-testing-standard" plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-test-quality.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-security-red-team.md, plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-performance.md, plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh, plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-performance.md, plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md, tests/hooks/test-test-quality-overlay.sh, .test-index; exemplars read: reviewer-delta-performance.md, code-reviewer-security-red-team.md) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ (existing RED test test_overlay_agent_file_exists in tests/hooks/test-test-quality-overlay.sh confirmed failing)
